spIBDerverse 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Hammersley-Clifford theorem
    • homophily-measures
    • Using the spIBDerapp

Transform vector to (a,b)

Source: R/transform_alpha.R
transform_alpha.Rd

Transform vector to (a,b)

Usage

transform_alpha(x, a = 0, b = 1)

Arguments

x

vector to transform

a

lower bound of transform

b

upper bound of transform

Value

transformed vector

Examples

transform_alpha(runif(100))
#>   [1] 0.000000000 0.476887438 0.670512513 0.107591606 0.328972908 0.354714782
#>   [7] 0.024108584 0.846929056 0.997863166 0.493018569 0.945590377 0.677194557
#>  [13] 0.550205642 0.955508530 0.434362126 0.382966964 0.904915079 0.748987845
#>  [19] 0.420442768 0.444862052 0.189191134 0.437853795 0.141078048 0.414369800
#>  [25] 0.387458022 0.492279962 0.342778449 0.022159860 0.563277398 0.202087570
#>  [31] 0.320422606 0.444656527 0.174775885 0.225797195 0.106012085 0.880163231
#>  [37] 0.039660724 0.338889991 0.324293278 0.823431837 0.499009610 0.652894206
#>  [43] 0.341451075 0.955593373 0.587705139 0.255428834 0.624733086 0.716069203
#>  [49] 0.592753181 0.490875274 0.844557587 0.205830287 0.806849171 0.036560968
#>  [55] 0.483551083 0.145847138 0.719043454 0.657734944 0.437196288 0.376346014
#>  [61] 0.218268651 0.934543819 0.495209143 0.309805069 0.308883965 0.377278235
#>  [67] 0.057477370 0.175475053 0.722503334 0.505670744 0.368399304 0.576155685
#>  [73] 0.528793045 0.421440676 0.688468179 0.006914052 0.499283915 0.775862009
#>  [79] 0.592759695 0.185266318 0.935529986 0.645294779 0.872007740 0.177982258
#>  [85] 0.355607732 0.720157443 0.890207343 0.895461814 0.316449389 0.293206634
#>  [91] 0.712388777 0.659463996 0.523413896 0.898461345 0.778948315 0.328430612
#>  [97] 0.127443831 0.603320091 0.814185280 1.000000000
